details.reason: MCP.so is a Next.js web application (github.com/chatmcp/mcp-directory) that requires GitHub or Google OAuth sign-in to access the submission form at https://mcp.so/submit. No public REST API exists for submission. No GitHub PAT or OAuth credentials are available in this environment. Automated (headless) submission is not feasible due to OAuth requirement.
submission_steps: 2. Click 'Sign In' button (GitHub or Google OAuth)
4. Fill form: Type=MCP Server, Name=my-automaton, URL=https://automation.songheng.vip
